programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre: The House That Screamed

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Zombie
programme.desc: In Italy, it was considered the sequel to Dawn Of The Dead. In America, it was called ZOMBIE and advertised with the tag line We Are Going To Eat You! Tisa Farrow, Ian McCulloch, Al Cliver, and Richard Johnson star in this worldwide splatter sensation ...

programme.title: Crowbar: The Killings of Wendell Graves
programme.desc: In the small town of Coburg, a young boy named Wendell Graves witnesses the brutal murder of his parents in their own bedroom. He watches in horror as a masked man stabs the couple repeatedly with a crowbar. Wendell escapes and spends the next 15 years of his life silently locked up in his aunt's farmhouse. There she plays the innocent caretaker, brainwashing him into believing that anyone and everyone who enters his parents' home is an intruder who must meet the same fate as they did. When newcomers Alex and Veronica move to town, they have no idea the fate that awaits them. On the first night in their new home, Wendell returns to destroy the intruders. After slashing his way through Veronica's friends, Wendell disappears into the night leaving Alex and Veronica searching for answers. Receiving no help from the people who live in the strange town, Alex and Veronica discover the tragic past that threatens to swallow them as it has so many before. Wendell Graves follows them at every turn and when Alex and Veronica split up to find the answers, Alex discovers that they were lured to town by a sociopathic real estate agent. Fearing the worst, Alex races against time to find his wife before it's too late. Crowbar is a thrilling slasher film in the vein of Halloween and Psycho that dives deep into the psyche of jealousy and hatred.

programme.title: Arkham Sanitarium: Soul Eater
programme.desc: Arkham Sanitarium stood vacant for years after a sex and death cult were apprehended for committing heinous sadistic acts with special needs patients. The Legend of Arkham grew and many paranormal investigators attempted to investigate but couldn't last the night. Now a married duo of experienced Paranormal specialists and their crew, find themselves trapped and having to band together to battle malevolent forces from another dimension as they grapple with the very real creatures and nightmares created by HP Lovecraft. Fighting abominations and malevolent spirits from beyond, they battle for their sanity, their lives and ultimately the life of planet earth.

programme.title: Ghost Attack on Sutton Street: Poltergeists and Paranormal Entities
programme.desc: Expert Ghost Hunters from Haunted Events UK search for life-after death in the notoriously haunted Old Street Market of Sutton Town in historic old England. The area is so haunted that within minutes the investigation's medium is contacted by not one, but four spirits, warning them not to split up or risk their lives.Ignoring the advice, they split into two teams. The first team lead by UK Paranormal Expert Lee Roberts, comes face to face with the child murderer named Tap Tap, who taunts them with noises and poltergeist activity. Team two uses thermal imaging cameras to pick up humanoid forms and warm hand prints, further witnessing their devices shockingly moved before their eyes, chairs tipping over, tables levitating, glasses thrown and doors slamming. The nightbecomes so terrifying that the hunt is called off, but not before one final terrifying incident. You have never witnessed a ghost hunt like this before. Blair Witch was a movie. This is real. Prepare yourselves for the most shocking Ghost Hunt ever recorded.

programme.title: Alien Overlords
programme.desc: SHORT - UFO's, Aliens, Men in Black, Government conspiracies and agendas. Like many people, Tom Keating thought that those things were the product of delusional minds until he met Spencer, an elite insider who reveals on his deathbed the horrifying truth to the Alien Agenda.

programme.title: Crop Circles: Celestial Signs or Human Hoaxes?
programme.desc: Clearly some crop circles are hoaxes. Others are inexplicable, with no evidence of human activity. This program asks why do crops undergo changes at the cellular level and what are the strange lights seen over the fields where crop circles are found?

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: We’re kicking off a special weekend at Legends Ranch in Bitely, Michigan — bringing together two groups connected by a shared respect for the outdoors. Legends Ranch has always stood for strong conservation values, and when you combine that with the work being done by the SCI Foundation and Sables, it sets the tone for something bigger than just a hunt. Sables members are deeply involved in shaping the future of hunting — reaching into classrooms, working with young people, collaborating with wildlife professionals, and engaging leaders at both the state and national level. Their efforts are centered on helping others understand wildlife diversity, the principles behind the North American Model of Wildlife Conservation, and the role hunting plays in maintaining balance in the wild. They’re also helping keep the tradition alive — showing that hunting still has a strong place in today’s culture and communities. With that kind of purpose behind it, this weekend is about more than time in the field — it’s about continuing something that matters.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen kicks off Wild Shots with a coast-to-coast deep dive into American gun culture. From the first colonial settlement to Capitol Hill, he explores the origins of the Second Amendment and the modern fight to protect it. Along the way, he teams up with top firearms experts and puts iconic weapons to the test—including a brutal challenge to see just how many rounds it takes to break an AR-15.

programme.title: Country Ball
programme.desc: Country Ball Coach Jesse Chinchar kicks off the first season of Country Ball in the heartland of football — Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Our realtors were already superstars, but now it’s time to move them even higher. In this episode, you’ll learn what it takes to win at the highest levels from the 30-billion-dollar-man Jay Abraham, SEO wizard AJ Aluthwala, leadership powerhouse Nate Bailey, and mindset genius Michael Bernoff. They’ll each share game-changing strategies to take our superstars (any anyone watching) into the stratosphere.

programme.title: NatureStream.tv
programme.desc: Your TV can be a window to a world of beauty, serenity, and well being. Our relaxing nature films and art displays can transform any environment into a natural oasis. Engineered for excellence, this high-performance wave will provide a canvas for the world's best surfers set against a stunning backdrop of the Arabian Gulf.
